prompt: A highly detailed fantasy anime illustration of two young men reclining inside separate transparent crystal-like display boxes suspended side by side in a dark, theatrical space, split into contrasting themes. The left box has a warm olive-green and gold palette and contains a calm, elegant young man with short light blond hair, pale skin, a black dress shirt, a loosened gold striped tie, cream trousers, and black shoes, lying in a relaxed pose while holding a small flower near his face. Around him are exactly 10 visible decorative elements: 1 brown paper bag filled with leafy green plants, 1 metal mug, 1 lemon, 1 small zebra figurine, 1 open book, 1 sunflower, trailing green vines, many floating soap bubbles, etched white floral drawings on the glass, and greenery covering the floor of the box. The right box has a dramatic crimson red and black palette and contains a mischievous, confident young man with tousled medium brown hair, pale skin, a black outfit with red accents and layered accessories, lounging with one knee raised while biting or holding a red rose. Around him are exactly 10 visible decorative elements: 1 bone-like white skeletal ornament, 1 faceted red gemstone, 1 faceted pale gemstone, 1 hanging card or tag on a chain, 1 red book, 1 wrapped piece of meat or food on a tray, 1 small lion figurine, 1 red snack bag, claw-like scratch marks beneath the box, and sparkling red crystal shards. The background is split vertically into a starry cosmic seam between the two boxes, with draped curtains, strings of triangular bunting, faint paw-print motifs on the red side, and exactly 4 balloons total: 2 on the left in white and olive green, 2 on the right in red and black. Make the composition ornate, glossy, and cinematic, with dramatic reflections on the glass, rich highlights, floating particles, luxurious textures, intricate props, and a nostalgic storybook mood. Render in polished modern anime key art style, ultra-detailed, elegant, dreamlike, and emotionally evocative.
